The '''IT-4 Warning Droid''' was a type of modified [[DZ-70 fugitive tracker droid]] used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Droid/Legends|Droids]] of this kind was unarmed as it primarily filled a reconnaissance role. IT-4 Warning Droids were used by the [[Rak'qua]] on [[Station Gamma]] above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="SWG:SG" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a number of spacers who explored Station Gamma fought and destroyed multiple IT-4 Warning Droids.<ref name="SWG:SG" />

==Behind the scenes==
IT-4 Warning Droids appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> IT-4 Warning Droids were added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
